DESCRIPTION:
The Asenso header should be visible at the top of the screen.

### Preconditions
1. The user has a valid registered account.
2. The user is successfully logged in to the application.
3. The Dashboard screen is loaded.

PARENT SUITE: Sprint X: Asenso Mobile Version 3 - Dashboard Screen

DESCRIPTION:
The system should not allow the user to login. An error message such as **"[Notice] Your number has not been registered yet."** should be displayed.

### Preconditions
1. The login page is accessible.
2. The user attempting to log in is not registered in the system.
NAME: UA_001: should not allow the user to login when incorrect number is entered.
